Step.name: v0.5 trace — for_hyp on Finding plus a Concluding closing the Goal
Step.Goal: Verify the v05 fixture parses cleanly and includes a Concluding atom.
Step.Hypothesis: The new Concluding atom is recognised by the closed-set parser.
Step.Concluding: REFER:H_01 supports the close; the v0.5 catalog contains Concluding.
